name: Coed y Cerrig NNR & Grwyne Fawr
highlights: Rare wet-woodland nature reserve with excellent all-ability boardwalk.
points_of_interest: National Nature Reserve; Partrishow Church nearby
parking_start: Coed y Cerrig NNR car park
food_drink_nearby: Skirrid Inn Llanvihangel; Queen's Head Cwmavon
hazards_notes: Boardwalk slippery in frost; narrow lanes to access
